name: wallet-selection-baseline
description: Adaptive selection + rating config for copy-trading wallet discovery on perp platforms. Encodes TAIL-DISCIPLINE criteria (add depth, stop usage, stack caps) as the PRIMARY filter — win rate is treated as a RED FLAG when extreme, not a goal, because a no-stop averaging-down martingale manufactures a high win rate by warehousing unrealized losses (see FRIEND_WALLETS_SOLANA_STUDY_2026-06). Tweak + iterate; bump version on every change.
changelog: 0.1.0 — initial baseline, grounded in the Jupiter Perps two-wallet study. Wallet1 (shallow martingale, 14 adds / 61x collateral multiple / 98.7% win) should grade C-D and be flagged; Wallet2 (54-add / $71k live stack) should AUTO-DISQUALIFY.

eligibility._doc: Hard cutoffs to even be scored. Below these = excluded (not graded F, just not enough data).

riskDiscipline._doc: PRIMARY criteria. These bound the tail. A martingale's danger lives here, not in the win rate.

maxAddDepth._doc: Adds per cycle. More adds = deeper averaging-down = fatter unrealized tail.

maxCollateralMultiple._doc: Peak collateral / first-buy collateral within a cycle. How far the stack escalates vs the starter. Wallet1 hit 61x.

peakCollateralVsMedian._doc: Worst-cycle peak collateral as a multiple of the wallet's median peak. Measures stack dispersion / surprise depth.

stopUsage._doc: Fraction of ADVERSE cycles the wallet actually cut at a loss vs rode to recovery. 0 = pure ride-or-liquidate (both study wallets = 0). This is the single most important discipline signal.

maxAdverseExcursionPct._doc: Worst observed MAE as a fraction of peak collateral on that cycle. How deep underwater positions go before recovering.

liquidations._doc: Realized liquidations in the covered window. Any liquidation is a tail that already fired.

openPositionGuard._doc: Live open cycles are where a martingale hides its bomb. Reject if a currently-open position is deeply underwater or deeply stacked relative to the wallet's norm. This is the Wallet2 disqualifier ($71k / -$33k live SOL short).

performance._doc: SECONDARY. Necessary but not sufficient — and win rate is BOUNDED on both ends, not maximized.

winRate._doc: Floor to be real; CEILING because an extreme win rate signals a no-stop martingale, not skill. Penalize, don't reward, win rate above the suspicious line.

ratingRubric._doc: Per-category letter grades A-F (A=4..F=0). Overall = weighted average, but ANY autoDisqualifier floors the overall to F regardless of category scores.

consistency._doc: Guards against the Wallet2 problem — +$9.5k that was really two short bursts. Reward steady profit across sub-periods, penalize concentration.

copyabilityAtScale._doc: Practical copier risk: a martingale copy must FRONT the escalating adds. Reserve = idle capital needed to survive the deep stacks at the target scale. Lower reserve requirement = more copyable.

autoDisqualifiers._doc: Any TRUE => overall grade F + 'DISQUALIFIED' flag, regardless of category averages. These encode the lessons from the study.

overall._doc: Emit BOTH a letter and a 0-10 score per category and overall, for the UI. A disqualified wallet shows F/0 overall with the breached rule(s) listed.

uiHints._doc: For the trader-browser UI: which fields to surface as columns/badges so a human can scan and select.
